task_description: Adjust community recommendation filters, save them as the default preferences, and browse the updated recommendations list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the top navigation item labeled “推荐” with a small downward arrow, indicating a clickable menu/tab in the Steam store header. In the full-screen view, Steam is open to the Store home page in Chinese, with the top navigation bar containing items such as 浏览, 推荐, 类别, and others above the featured banner carousel.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open or select the Store's Recommendations menu/tab from the top navigation bar.
caption.action: Click the “推荐” menu in the top navigation bar.
caption.expectation: The Recommendations menu or page should open, or the store view should switch to the recommendations section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the recommendation dropdown item labeled “社区推荐” in a vertical menu. The menu is open beneath the top navigation area, and nearby items include “您的探索队列”, “新品队列”, “交互式推荐模型”, “好友中热门”, and “Steam 鉴赏家”. In the full-screen view, this is the Steam Store page in Chinese, with the “推荐” top navigation already opened as a dropdown over the storefront content.
caption.think: The user likely wants to choose the “社区推荐” option from the Recommendations dropdown menu to open the community recommendations section.
caption.action: Click the “社区推荐” menu item in the open dropdown menu.
caption.expectation: The dropdown menu should close and Steam should navigate to or load the Community Recommendations page/section.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on a blue rectangular button labeled “筛选条件及选项” with a small downward arrow, indicating a clickable filter/options dropdown control in the page content area. In the full-screen view, Steam is on the Chinese Store page titled “社区推荐,” and this button sits near the top of the recommendations list above the game recommendation cards.
caption.think: The user likely wants to open the filter and options controls for the Community Recommendations page to refine or adjust what recommendations are shown.
caption.action: Click the blue “筛选条件及选项” dropdown button.
caption.expectation: The filter/options panel or dropdown should open below or near the button, showing selectable recommendation filtering controls.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the middle radio-button option labeled “上周撰写” under the heading “按日期筛选.” The selected option above it, “昨日撰写,” currently has a blue-filled radio circle, while “上周撰写” has an empty radio circle, confirming the target is a clickable UI control in the filter panel rather than blank space. In the full-screen view, Steam is on the Chinese “社区推荐” page with the expanded filter/options panel open near the top of the recommendations section, showing groups such as date filter, playtime filter, language filter, and tag filters.
caption.think: The user likely wants to change the date filter from reviews written yesterday to reviews written last week so the community recommendations refresh based on a broader recent time range.
caption.action: Click the “上周撰写” radio-button option in the “按日期筛选” section.
caption.expectation: The “上周撰写” option should become selected, replacing “昨日撰写,” and the recommendation results should update to reflect that date filter.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the radio-button label “全部语言” in the “按语言筛选” section. Just below it, “您的语言” currently has a blue-filled radio circle, while “全部语言” has an empty radio circle, so the target is a UI control in the filter panel. In the full-screen view, Steam is open to the Chinese “社区推荐” page with the expanded filter/options panel visible, including sections for date, playtime, language, tags, and exclusion settings.
caption.think: The user likely wants to change the language filter from only the user's language to all languages so the community recommendations include a broader set of reviews or games.
caption.action: Click the “全部语言” radio-button option in the “按语言筛选” section.
caption.expectation: The “全部语言” option should become selected, replacing “您的语言,” and the recommendation/filter results should refresh accordingly.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on a blue rectangular button labeled “保存为默认偏好.” This is a UI control in the filter/options area, not blank space. In the full-screen Steam window, the expanded “社区推荐” filter panel is visible, with date, playtime, language, tags, and exclusion options already set, and this save-preferences button appears near the bottom of that panel above the “隐藏筛选条件及选项” button.
caption.think: The user likely wants to save the currently chosen recommendation filter settings as the default preference for future visits to the store homepage and similar pages.
caption.action: Click the blue “保存为默认偏好” button.
caption.expectation: Steam should save the current filter configuration as the default preference, likely showing a brief confirmation or updating the saved-preference status without changing the page layout significantly.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on a blue rectangular button labeled “隐藏筛选条件及选项,” with a small upward chevron on its right side. This is a clickable UI control in the filter panel. In the full-screen Steam window, the “社区推荐” page is open with the expanded filtering/options area visible, and this button sits near the bottom of that panel below the saved-preferences section.
caption.think: The user likely wants to collapse the currently expanded recommendation filters/options panel after saving the preferences and setting the desired filters.
caption.action: Click the blue “隐藏筛选条件及选项” button.
caption.expectation: The filter/options panel should collapse or hide immediately, reducing the visible filter section and bringing more recommendation content into view.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the full Steam window without any semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action rather than a click target. The page is on Steam’s dark-blue “社区推荐” section. Near the top of the content area is a blue button labeled “筛选条件及选项” with a downward chevron, showing the filter panel is currently collapsed. Below it, recommendation cards are visible, including a large game image on the left and review text on the right; the next recommendation card is already partially visible lower on the page. In the full-screen view, this is the Steam store/community page, and the main page content area appears to be the active scrollable region.
caption.think: The user likely wants to continue moving down the community recommendations page after collapsing the filter/options panel, so more recommendation entries become visible.
caption.action: Scroll down in the main Steam page content area.
caption.expectation: The recommendations list should move upward, revealing more game recommendation cards and review content further down the page.
